_comment: Dependencies merged into local/backstage/packages/backend/package.json by scripts/backstage-init.sh. The custom scaffolder action modules (src/modules/scaffolderAction*.ts) import these directly; declaring them keeps the build's @backstage/no-undeclared-imports lint rule happy. @backstage/* versions track the create-app line pinned in .env.example; @octokit/rest backs the github:addLabels / github:closePullRequest actions.
